atomic_facts.fact: A man in a white chef's coat is the primary subject of the first frame.
The background of the first frame is a commercial kitchen with stainless steel surfaces.
The second frame displays a red circular logo.
The logo contains a stylized white outline of a mushroom.
The text 'De groente die alles kan!' is written in a white, curved font at the top of the red logo.
The text 'champignonidee.nl' is written in a white, curved font at the bottom of the red logo.

spatial: The first frame is a close-up shot of a man in a kitchen, with equipment visible above and behind him. The second frame is a full-screen graphic of a red circular logo on a white background.

atomic_facts.fact: The top frame displays a European Union co-financing statement.
The bottom frame displays Facebook and Twitter logos.
The text 'www.facebook.com/champignonidee' is visible in red.
The text 'www.twitter.com/champignonidee' is visible in red.

spatial: The video consists of two static slides. The first slide features a horizontal banner with the EU flag on the left and text on the right. The second slide features two social media icons stacked vertically on the left, with corresponding URLs to their right.
